assertions.title: Cash/bank account resolution uses explicit configuration, not name matching

steps.expected: Auto-settlement cash resolution should use explicit configured account IDs, not CASH/BANK name matching.
steps.observed: CompanyDefaultAccountsService resolves requestedCashAccountId or company.getPayrollCashAccount() and validates the selected account; AccountResolutionService delegates directly to CompanyDefaultAccountsService. No CASH/BANK token matching appears in those methods.
